# Lastest2

> Visual regression testing platform with AI-powered test generation, self-healing selectors, and MCP server for agent integration.

## Overview

Lastest2 records browser interactions, runs Playwright tests, diffs screenshots against baselines, and uses AI to classify visual changes. It supports 3 diff engines, 6 AI providers, and 12 stabilization features for flake-free testing.

## MCP Integration

Install: `npx @lastest/mcp-server --url <URL> --api-key <KEY>`

Tools: lastest2_run_tests, lastest2_get_build_status, lastest2_list_tests, lastest2_list_failing_tests, lastest2_get_visual_diff, lastest2_approve_baseline, lastest2_reject_baseline, lastest2_create_test, lastest2_get_coverage, lastest2_heal_test

## API

Base: /api/v1/
Auth: Bearer token
Endpoints: /repos, /repos/:id/tests, /repos/:id/builds, /repos/:id/coverage, /builds/:id, /diffs/approve, /diffs/reject, /tests/create, /tests/:id/heal

## Documentation

- AGENTS.md: Agent integration guide
- SKILL.md: OpenClaw skill definition
- CLAUDE.md: Development instructions
